parent f7d1ec2d9e433b4073deac5d15a8234f0c6dd5e9
author slfan1989 <55643692+slfan1989@users.noreply.github.com> 1712015279 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1712015279 +0800

YARN-11663. [Federation] Add Cache Entity Nums Limit. (#6662) Contributed by Shilun Fan.

Reviewed-by: Dinesh Chitlangia <dineshc@apache.org>
Signed-off-by: Shilun Fan <slfan1989@apache.org>

files.patch:
@@ -3787,6 +3787,15 @@
    <value>300</value>
   </property>
 
+  <property>
+    <description>
+      The number of entries in the Federation cache.
+      default is 1000.
+    </description>
+    <name>yarn.federation.cache-entity.nums</name>
+    <value>1000</value>
+  </property>
+
   <property>
     <description>The registry base directory for federation.</description>
     <name>yarn.federation.registry.base-dir</name>
